query: SELECT ts.id, ts.openingName, ts.bestAccuracy, ts.lastPlayedAt, ts.cyclesCompleted, COUNT(ch.id) as completed_cycles FROM training_sets ts LEFT JOIN cycle_history ch ON ts.id = ch.trainingSetId GROUP BY ts.id LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT ts.id, ts.openingName, ts.bestAccuracy, ts.lastPlayedAt, ts.cyclesCompleted, COUNT(ch.id) as completed_cycles FROM training_sets ts LEFT JOIN cycle_history ch ON ts.id = ch.trainingSetId GROUP BY ts.id LIMIT 10;
